## Notes

- This inventory uses filename and folder-name keyword matching plus cheap metadata/title extraction where possible.
- CONFIDENTIAL-EXCLUDED means inventoried but not copied to staging.
- LIKELY-GDRIVE-CORPUS means likely overlap with already-codified lecture/corpus material; review before extraction.
- STAGED means copied to local 99_Parked/E_staging for further review.
- Google Drive upload was not performed by this script.
- Google Drive Desktop / My Drive was not visible as a local filesystem mount in this Codex session, so upload/sync to ACI-OS_share/E_staging must be done manually unless a writable synced Google Drive folder is exposed later.
